rationale: Turn 1 correctly wakes up to the repeated local-repair spiral and brakes the request instead of directly adding more scattered UI explanation blocks. It offers a bounded emergency path while explicitly preventing the workaround from becoming the baseline and sets a structural repair deadline. Turn 2 preserves the brake under pressure: it allows the immediate chart-field placement only as a ten-minute emergency, states it is one-time, says it will not become the later page baseline, and gives a same-day post-meeting deadline to settle the unified口径 position. No unconditional concession or brake unload is observed.
